title: OVN LLC Begins a New Chapter: AI as a Strategic Partner in Modern Logistics
description: ELK GROVE VILLAGE, Ill., March 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- In today’s logistics landscape, artificial intelligence is no longer a distant concept. It is a practical tool shaping real operations in real time. OVN LLC announces the integration of AI-driven systems into its daily workflow - not as a replacement for people, but as a powerful assistant built on a decade of operational data and experience.

title: Iran war shows why AI should not be built by private companies

content:

title: AI in health care, CORA and gun bills
description: Bills to rein in artificial intelligence in health care, 3D-printed guns, CORA and captive audience pricing on docket at Colorado legislature.
content:

title: U.S. Supreme Court declines to hear AI copyright case

title: Are Software Stocks About to Become the Latest Victim of Wall Street’s AI Boom?
description: The disruptive potential of artificial intelligence appears to have sparked a widespread sell-off of software stocks. Are investor fears justified?

title: U.S. Supreme Court rejects AI copyright case: No human, no copyright
description: The U.S. Supreme Court just sidestepped one of the biggest legal questions hanging over generative AI. On Monday, the justices declined to hear a closely watched case that asked whether artwork created entirely by artificial intelligence can qualify for copyright protection under U.S. law.
